name: project-loop-methodology
description: Five phase-aware diagnostic agents that critique agentic product work through six PM-derived lenses (project loop, outcome altitude, project constraint cascade, attention priority budget, intent verification, project lifecycle). Tuned for indie product builders / vibe-coders who delegate the build to agents and need to verify whether the built thing matches intent. Agents use prompts, issues, diffs, screenshots, tests, logs, demos, and acceptance criteria as first-class evidence; Linear, OKRs, stakeholders, roadmaps, and status reports are optional context only.
